local_results.title: Becky's Diner
local_results.description: Laid-back diner serving classic dishes. Fishermen & others often pack this waterfront, no-nonsense diner serving American eats.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Awesome serving staff food was great and prices were solid."

local_results.title: Miss Portland Diner
local_results.description: Landmark diner with all-day breakfast. University-adjacent diner is a go-to for traditional comfort grub in a vintage dining-car space.
local_results.user_review: "Great food served with a great smile at a good price."

local_results.title: Mazzat Restaurant
local_results.description: Casual restaurant serving Mediterranean and Iraqi fare such as gyros and hummus.
local_results.user_review: "The presentation is lovely - great portion sizes and very reasonable prices."

local_results.title: Bread & Friends
local_results.user_review: "And if you dine in you get $1 off a loaf of bread"

local_results.title: Po' Boys & Pickles
local_results.description: New Orleans-style sandwich shop. Small, easygoing joint constructing oversized po' boy sandwiches along with other hearty Cajun eats.
local_results.user_review: "The meat is well cooked and is a very hearty portion for $13.00."

local_results.title: Rosie's Restaurant & Pub
local_results.description: Relaxed haunt with pub grub & draft beer. Laid-back hangout with exposed-brick walls offering 15 beers on tap plus burgers, pizza & wings.
local_results.user_review: "Great energy, tasty food & a big menu, cold drinks & reasonable prices."

local_results.title: Tomaso's Canteen
local_results.description: Cozy neighborhood bar with local beer. Compact, down-to-earth neighborhood bar offering a variety of local brews, pub grub & brunch.
local_results.user_review: "Good food, cheap drinks, good vibes!"

local_results.title: Black Cow Burgers & Fries
local_results.description: Hip, airy hub for burgers & cocktails. Trendy, spacious restaurant serving burgers & comfort side dishes, plus sodas, shakes & cocktails.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Food is inexpensive and service is fast and friendly."

local_results.title: Quiero Cafe
local_results.description: Casual hangout for Latin American fare. Relaxed eatery dishing up classic Latin American dishes, plus sandwiches, cocktails & desserts.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "The food was delicious, it was reasonably priced, and the service was great."

local_results.title: Market Street Eats
local_results.description: Wraps & salads in an upbeat cafe. Counter-serve cafe offering wraps (including breakfast varieties) & salads amid cheery decor.

parking: Usually difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Really reasonable prices too."

local_results.title: Dutch's
local_results.description: Chill eatery for creative daytime dishes. Bright, counter-serve fixture preparing made-to-order breakfast & lunch standards with a twist.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "The prices were a little steeper than expected but the food was phenomenal."

local_results.title: Tu Casa
local_results.description: Casual choice for Salvadoran specialties. Down-to-earth establishment with a warm feel doling out traditional, family-style Salvadoran dishes.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Great value as well for the quality and quantity."

local_results.title: Punky's
local_results.description: Casual cafe for sandwiches & hot entrees. Relaxed outfit offering American hot & cold sandwiches & prepared mains like tuna casserole.
local_results.user_review: "Absolutely wonderful owners, great food for a great price!"

local_results.title: Marcy's Diner
local_results.description: Snug diner popular for breakfast. Cozy nook with a few counter stools & booths is a local mainstay for its homey American breakfasts.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "For the price, the experience and the amount of food this place is a steal!"

local_results.title: Ruski's Tavern
local_results.description: Watering hole & diner since 1892. Open since 1892, a traditional pub & American diner in a wood-panelled building.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "I had the lobster stew and it was spectacular especially for the price!!"

local_results.title: Dinas Cuisine
local_results.description: Casually styled eatery dishing up kebabs, falafel, shawarma, gyros and other Middle Eastern eats including salads, sandwiches and soups.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Delicious food, friendly staff, and really great prices!"

local_results.title: The Frying Dutchman
local_results.address: 28 Monument Sq Second Floor, Portland, ME 04101
local_results.description: Market eatery serving global street food including fried chicken, mapo poutine, and cheese corn dogs.
local_results.user_review: "Also very reasonably priced and affordable, even the seafood."

local_results.title: Wayside Tavern
local_results.description: Cozy tavern featuring delicious pasta, steak and seafood fare, a wine list and a beer program.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Mondays at Wayside are the best with $10 burgers and Tara running the bar!"

local_results.title: The Outpost
local_results.user_review: "The ribs are available at the outlet."

local_results.title: Ironclad Eats
local_results.user_review: "The chop cheese tacos literally changed my life."
